name: Rogz Dog Utility Side Release Collar X-Small Yellow
description: The ROGZ Utility Side Release Collar X-Small – Yellow is built to keep your small dog safe, comfortable, and visible wherever the day takes you. Designed with premium materials and smart safety technology, this lightweight yet sturdy collar is ideal for daily walks, training sessions, and nighttime outings. Crafted from high-quality nylon webbing , the collar delivers long-lasting durability without adding weight or bulk to your pet’s neck. Reflective stitching is woven directly into the webbing, ensuring your dog stays visible in low-light conditions—perfect for early morning or evening strolls. For enhanced security, the collar features the signature RogLoc buckle , trusted for its “Fort Knox”-level hold that prevents accidental openings while still offering smooth, easy handling. The built-in Low Load Technology (LLT) redistributes tension through a strategically positioned load ring, reducing stress on the buckle and extending the collar’s lifespan. Every detail is made for comfort, including contoured plastic components that sit gently against your dog’s neck and a chrome-plated die-cast ring that provides a strong, rust-resistant attachment point for any standard leash. With an 11mm width and an adjustable neck size of 25–35 cm , this X-Small collar is ideal for toy breeds, small dogs, and growing puppies. Whether you’re using it for identification tags or daily outings, it offers the perfect blend of safety, visibility, and everyday reliability.
